title: Warning indicator system and related methods
abstract: A warning indicator system for an autonomous vehicle includes a sensor pod, a connecting assembly, and a warning indicator. The sensor pod has a sensor and a sensor pod housing. The connecting assembly is configured to couple the sensor pod to the autonomous vehicle. The warning indicator is associated with the sensor pod and the connecting assembly. The warning indicator is configured to alert other vehicles and persons to a stopped condition of the autonomous vehicle. An autonomous vehicle includes the warning indicator.
claims: 1. A warning indicator system for an autonomous vehicle, the warning indicator system comprising: a first side mirror assembly positioned on a first side of the autonomous vehicle, the first side mirror assembly comprising: a first side mirror assembly housing; a first mirror coupled to a rear facing side of the first side mirror assembly housing; a first warning indicator coupled to the first mirror such that a first visual indicator is provided on a first mirrored surface of the first mirror to alert other vehicles and persons to a stopped condition of the autonomous vehicle, the first visual indicator indicating a first direction away from the autonomous vehicle; and a first sensor; a first connecting assembly configured to couple the first side mirror assembly to the autonomous vehicle; a second side mirror assembly positioned on a second side of the autonomous vehicle opposite the first side, the second side mirror assembly comprising: a second side mirror assembly housing; a second mirror coupled to a rear facing side of the second side mirror assembly housing; a second warning indicator coupled to the second mirror such that a second visual indicator is provided on a second mirrored surface of the second mirror to alert other vehicles and persons to a stopped condition of the autonomous vehicle, the second visual indicator indicating a second direction away from the autonomous vehicle that is opposite the first direction; and a second sensor; and a second connecting assembly configured to couple the second side mirror assembly to the autonomous vehicle.
